reviews.comment:
Desde chica cada viaje a BsAs parábamos a cargar combustible ahí (con mis viejos)  Ahora cuando viajo, paro seguido. Me trae lindos recuerdos !

(Translated by Google)
Since I was a child, every trip to Buenos Aires we'd stop there for gas (with my parents). Now when I travel, I stop there often. It brings back fond memories!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNScV9lZEd3EAE
